shorts.title: Your Habits Are Broken (Here's Why)
shorts.description: You're consistent with habits but stuck on goals. Problem: they're not connected. Watch to see how turning isolated habits into a system changes everything. #Shorts #Habits #PersonalGrowth #SystemsThinking
shorts.hook_visual: Text overlay appearing over scattered habit icons (meditation, reading, work) that morph into an interconnected glowing loop. Bold text: 'You're doing habits. Not systems.'
shorts.end_screen_cta: Questions? Drop them below. And if this helped, follow for more on building systems that actually work.

shorts.title: My habits were perfect. My life wasn't.
shorts.description: I tracked every habit, hit every streak — and still felt stuck. The problem wasn't willpower. It was architecture. #Shorts #HabitBuilding #SelfImprovement

shorts.title: My habits weren't helping — they were amplifying
shorts.description: Meditation sharpens the thinking. Better thinking makes the work easier. Better work proves the system matters — and that loop compounds literally, not abstractly. Once I saw this, everything changed. #PersonalDevelopment #HabitStacking #Shorts

shorts.title: Here's What Nobody Tells You About Discipline
shorts.description: Most people think discipline keeps a system running. It's the opposite — a well-built engine needs less willpower, not more. The hard part isn't execution. It's the setup. #Shorts #HabitBuilding #SelfDevelopment

shorts.title: Three Habit Categories That Actually Work
shorts.description: Foundation habits create the baseline. Work habits move goals forward. Reflection habits make visible what's working. Once you stop treating them as a flat list and start seeing the layers, everything connects differently. #Shorts #HabitBuilding #PersonalGrowth

shorts.title: The Sunday Question That Improves Your Whole Week
shorts.description: Every Sunday evening, one question: which habit enabled my best work this week? Not about perfection — about visibility. Over time you see what actually matters to your goals. And you cut everything that doesn't. #Shorts #WeeklyReview #Habits

shorts.title: A Good System Needs Less Willpower, Not More
shorts.description: Most people think you build a system, then discipline keeps it running. It's the opposite. A well-built engine requires less discipline because the architecture does the work. The hard part isn't maintaining it — it's the setup. #Shorts #SystemsThinking #Productivity
